name: Tamale Pie II
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium green peppers -- seeded and chopped
2 Medium red sweet peppers -- seeded and chopped
4.5 ounces Sliced pitted ripe olives, drained
8 ounces Jar mild chunky salsa (3/4 cup)
2 Packages corn muffin mix (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet, cook ground beef, peppers, and onion until meat is brown.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in soup, sliced olives, salsa, and water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
4. Simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Prepare corn muffin mix according to package directions.
6. Spread half of the muffin batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
7. Spoon the hot meat mixture over the muffin layer.
8. Carefully spread the remaining corn muffin batter over the meat mixture.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the muffin layer is golden.
10. Top with cheese. If desired, garnish with tomatoes and whole olives.
11. Cut into squares.
Makes 12 to 15 servings.
